description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a test stage and three jobs. The cache gems job runs in the test stage, executes the script `bundle package --all --all-platforms`, sets the variable SETUP_DB to 'false', caches the vendor/cache directory as an artifact, depends on and needs the setup-test-env job, and only runs on the master branch or tags when $CI_SERVER_HOST == "gitlab.com" && $CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE == "gitlab-org". The gitlab_git_test job extends the minimal-job template and runs the script `spec/support/prepare-gitlab-git-test-for-commit --check-for-changes`. The no_ee_check job also extends the minimal-job template, runs the script `scripts/no-ee-check`, and is limited to runs when the CI server host and project name match either $CI_SERVER_HOST == "gitlab.com" && $CI_PROJECT_NAME == "gitlab-foss" or $CI_SERVER_HOST == "dev.gitlab.org" && $CI_PROJECT_NAME == "gitlabhq".
